Hero.tagline: Focused on crafting precise, scalable interfaces.
Hero.description: Bridging design and engineering to ship high-quality product experiences.

Work.title: My Work
Work.subtitle: Where design comes to life through code.

About.title: About Me
About.subtitle: UX Engineer & Frontend Developer
About.description1: With 5+ years of experience, I build interfaces that solve real problems. I work at the intersection of design and development.
About.description2: Specialized in user experience, accessibility, and clean code. I create products that people enjoy using.
About.description3: Always learning. Inspired by games, typography, and good design.

Contact.title: Elsewhere
Contact.description: Connect with me on social media or send me an email. Always interested in talking about design, development, and new projects.

1.title: Software Engineer
1.description:
1. Built scalable micro-frontend architecture with React & TypeScript — used across multiple client teams.
2. Led full frontend of a new client-facing platform (Laravel integration), from 0 to production.
3. Created UI component system + responsive email templates aligned to product design guidelines.
4. Bridged design and engineering — translating complex specs into pixel-perfect delivery.

2.title: Web Designer
2.description:
1. Designed and built custom WordPress interfaces tailored to individual client goals and brand.
2. Integrated plugins strategically, extending functionality without impacting performance.
3. Mentored early-stage students 1:1 in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript fundamentals.
4. Improved component layout and usability for HubSpot-based projects.

3.title: Web UI Developer
3.description:
1. Developed and maintained features across multiple internal platforms used daily by the full team.
2. Led codebase migration and refactoring — measurably improved readability and maintainability.
3. Redesigned the main site's experience, achieving a perfect 100/100 Lighthouse accessibility score.
4. Created Figma UX/UI mockups used as direct spec by the dev team.
5. Built and documented a reusable UI component system (buttons, menus, inputs, etc.).
6. Served as frontend reference across teams — primary point of contact for UI decisions.

4.title: Freelance Web Designer
4.description:
1. Designed and built websites with React and HTML/CSS for international clients — concept to deployment.
2. Optimized cross-browser performance to ensure consistent experience on all devices.
3. Managed client relationships directly, translating requirements into user-centered visual solutions.

5.title: Web Layout Developer
5.description:
1. Built visual components from existing designs with high fidelity to product identity.
2. Identified and fixed layout errors, ensuring visual consistency across environments.
3. Transformed static designs into functional interfaces, contributing to team quality standards.

Journal.title: Journal
Journal.post1Excerpt: I am working on some interesting topics to share with you
